{{Quote|What makes you think I ever owned Celia?|Han Solo|<ref name="TG" />}}
'''Celia''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Codru-Ji]] dancer. She worked for [[Mawbo Kem]] and was present when the ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' was stolen by [[Kitster Chanchani Banai]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and Celia had met previously. She also had at least some minimal [[Bartender/Legends|bartending]] skills, as she once made a couple of [[cometduster]]s for Han and his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]].<ref name="TG" />

{{Char-stub}}
